content:
守密人你好：
       彌薩格大學校務處將於6月16日22:20進行校內設施修復，更新完成後您將得到通知，重新進入遊戲。對於更新可能給大家帶來的不便，我們會準備一份補給物資以示歉意。祝大家調查順利！ 
  
【補給物資】
在線維護補償：銀芯*50
  
【領取條件】
領取時間截至2025年6月30日23:59。請記得及時前往郵箱領取補給物資哦。  
 
【更新內容】
● 修復了某些關卡退出後會殘留文字的問題。
● 優化了關卡編隊界面退出至關卡詳情時可能的卡頓問題。
● 修復了守密人頭像「以銀鑰之名：守密人」頭像在「無形者的請柬」中被錯誤的分類到了表情的問題。
● 修復了活動界面在某些情況下可能觸發黑屏的問題。
● 修復了「試訓模式」某些情況下，莉莉技能目標選擇錯誤的問題。
● 修復了「和平的一天：守密人·在嗎」表情名稱錯誤的問題
● 修復了「商店：幻衣訂購」中幻衣購買時，因缺少二次確認提示，容易誤觸購買的問題。
● 優化了「商店」中幻衣訂購界面，幻衣商品圖標的清晰度。
● 修復了喚醒體「熔毀 · 朵爾」宿命坍縮中毒升級描述錯誤為 攻擊力*40% 的問題，滿級時應為 攻擊力*60％，對實際邏輯沒有影響。
● 修復了喚醒體「克萊門汀」超限爆發力量描述錯誤為攻擊力 50% 的問題，應為 攻擊力*45％，對實際邏輯沒有影響。
● 修復了造物「維度影像·卡斯托爾」的臨時力量增益效果能夠享受喚醒體「克萊門汀」靈塑適性增幅的問題。
● 修復了命輪「不可承受的自由」戰鬥內描述缺失了「造成的基礎傷害提高」效果的問題。
● 修復了命輪「魔女寬檐帽」某些情況下不會正確獲得狂氣的問題。
● 修復了命輪「傷痛之鰭」會錯誤提升百分比生命回復效果的問題。
● 優化了相位對弈「苦咒縛」描述為「「打擊」額外造成 3 傷害並施加等量額外傷害的中毒」來使其更加清晰，對實際邏輯沒有影響。
● 修復了相位對弈中，命輪「被縛的歌謠」和技能「星獸餘威」無法正確產生組合效果的問題。
● 修復了「編隊」界面關閉時，界域圖標右側文字「已激活」文本未正常消失的問題。
● 優化了語言設置為英語時的以下文本表述問題：
    ○ 修復了約5000條活動關卡、探索事件、劇情關卡名翻譯不統一、文本過長難以閱讀的問題。
    ○ 優化了約500條怪物和敵方喚醒體名稱的機器翻譯問題，如「▼阿▼▼亞」翻譯"▼A▼▼Asia"修正為"Gh▼tan▼▼hoa"，「修▼▼」翻譯"Repair▼▼"修正為"Shoggo▼▼"，「超越萬古」翻譯"Beyond Eternity"修正為"Out of the Aeons"等。
    ○ 修復了新一批約3200條戰鬥相關文本中的措辭不統一和數字錯誤顯示問題，同時優化了部分戰鬥界面的UI文本翻譯，如層數Floor修正為Stacks。同類文本還將持續優化。
    ○ 為喚醒體「熔毀·朵爾」添加了人工校對的英語版技能背景故事和語音字幕。
    ○ 優化了半步之隔·復刻 活動界面劇情包裝文本的表述；
    ○ 優化了部分命輪，屬性，界面包裝文本的措辭一致性；
    ○ 優化了通關高難戰鬥後的戰鬥數據信息界面文本的易讀性；
    ○ 優化了守密人信息界面文本的表述

V2.2.2.8 Online Maintenance Notice
Dear Keeper,
    The Mythag University Administration Office will conduct facility repairs on June 16 at 22:20(UTC+8). You will be notified once the update is complete and can re-enter the game. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and will provide a supply package as compensation. Happy investigating!
    
【Supply Package】
Maintenance Compensation: Silver×50
    
【Claim Conditions】
Claim period ends on June 30 2025(UTC+8), at 23:59. Please remember to check your mailbox to claim the supply package.
     
【Update Content】
● Fixed an issue where text would remain after exiting certain stages. 
● Optimized potential stutters when exiting the stage lineup interface back to the stage details. 
● Fixed an issue where the "Keeper" avatar "By the Name of Silver Key: Keeper" was incorrectly categorized as an emote in "Formless One's Invitation." 
● Fixed an issue where the event interface could cause a black screen in certain situations.
● Fixed an issue in "Trial Mode" where Lily's skill target selection was incorrect in some cases.
● Fixed an issue with incorrect naming for the emote "Peaceful Day: Keeper · Hello?" 
● Fixed an issue in "Store: Phantom Outfit Orders" where the lack of a secondary confirmation prompt made accidental purchases more likely. 
● Improved the clarity of phantom outfit item icons in the "Phantom Outfit Order" interface within the "Store." 
● Fixed an issue where the Awakener "Meltdown · Doll" had an incorrect description for the Poison Upgrade, mistakenly showing ATK ×40% instead of the correct value of ATK ×60%, which did not affect actual gameplay logic. 
● Fixed an issue where the Awakener "Clementine" had an incorrect description for Over-Exaltation STR, mistakenly showing 50% ATK instead of the correct value of ATK ×45%, which did not affect actual gameplay logic.

● Fixed an issue where the Relic "Dimensional Image · Castor" could benefit from the Soulforge Aptitude boost provided by the Awakener "Clementine." 
● Fixed an issue where the Wheel of Destiny "Unbearable Freedom" was missing the "Base DMG Boost" effect in its battle description. 
● Fixed an issue where the Wheel of Destiny "Witch's Wide-brimmed Hat" would not correctly gain Aliemus under certain conditions. 
● Fixed an issue where the Wheel of Destiny "Fin of Sorrow" was incorrectly increasing percentage-based HP Healing effects. 
● Updated the description of Traphase "Cursed Binding" to read "Strike inflicts an additional 3 DMG and applies Poison equal to that amount of extra DMG," making it clearer, without affecting actual gameplay logic. 
● Fixed an issue in Traphase where the Wheel of Destiny "Song of the Bound" and the skill "Starbeast's Afterglow" were unable to generate their combined effect properly. 
● Fixed an issue where, upon closing the "Lineup" interface, the text "Activated" on the right side of the Realm icon did not disappear as expected.
● Localization Fixes and Improvements (English Language Setting):
    ○ Fixed the issue of inconsistent or excessively long translations for approximately 5,000 Event Stages, Exploration Events, and Story Chapter names.
    ○ Optimized machine translation issues for approximately 500 monster and enemy Awakener names, such as "▼A▼▼Asia" corrected to "Gh▼tan▼▼hoa", "Repair▼▼" corrected to "Shoggo▼▼", and "Beyond Eternity" corrected to "Out of the Aeons".
    ○ Fixed wording inconsistencies and numerical display errors in a new batch of approximately 3,200 battle-related texts. Also optimized UI text translations for some battle interfaces, such as changing Floor to Stacks. Similar texts will continue to be optimized.

○ Added manually proofread English skill background story and voiceline subtitles for the Awakener "Doll: Inferno".
    ○ Optimized the narrative text presentation in the Half Step Away: Rerun event interface.
    ○ Improved wording consistency for some Wheels of Destiny, attributes, and interface descriptions.
    ○ Enhanced readability of post-challenge battle stats in high-difficulty combat clear screens.
    ○ Refined text descriptions in the Keeper Info interface.
不對欸，你們當初賣的時候公告就是50%阿，哪來的45%對實際邏輯沒有影響???
游戏内描述+前瞻描述都是50%两个月过去了说是错误描述
不应该修改为实际效果吗
@everyone 克莱门汀这条修复经过复核后处理方式有误，很抱歉，我们会后续调整为 50% 攻击力。

這次貓不錯

以前的貓 可能會跟你說發佈前後調整 執意45%
引發炎上<:thumbsup:1356086340298473574>
熔朵這算加強了還是削弱了啊，萌新沒太看懂
沒改變，只是把文本修正
還以為今天剛抽超限就要被砍
